ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-02-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE WAS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 5/22/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 5/12/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. ALL DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT APPLIES. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 3/15/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. IT IS ORDERDED THAT THE VERIFICATIONS TO PLAINTIFFS' G.O. 129 DISCOVERY RESPONSES SHALL BE SERVED BY 2/16/06. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO; CLERK: VERA MU/LESPY/JIROQUE; REPORTER:BOB BALIAN CSR #5220 (206)
